title: Start Every Layout in Normal Flow
summary: Build and verify css normal flow in shift deck layout enhancement baseline through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css normal flow from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css normal flow without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the shift deck layout enhancement baseline case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves css normal flow when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: shift deck layout enhancement baseline.
steps.why: Start Every Layout in Normal Flow makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in shift deck layout enhancement baseline.

content.text: Normal flow places block boxes in block sequence and inline content in line boxes according to writing mode. It provides resilient source order, content-driven block growth, wrapping, and predictable accessibility before floats, positioning, Flexbox, or Grid enhance a specific relationship. Removing major content from flow creates manual space and overlap obligations. Apply it to shift deck layout enhancement baseline.
